nasb.text: “And to the angel of the church in Pergamum write: The One who has the sharp two-edged sword says this:

esv.text: “And to the angel of the church in Pergamum write: ‘The words of him who has     the sharp two-edged sword.

cnv.text: “你要寫信給在別迦摩教會的使者，說： ‘那有一把兩刃利劍的，這樣說：

ccb.text: “你要写信告诉别迦摩教会的天使，那位有两刃利剑的主说，

csbs.text: “你要给那在佩尔伽马教会的使者    写信说： “那位有双刃利剑的，这样说：
